tasks.label: populate-missing-images
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'assets/img/blog','assets/img/hero','assets/img/gallery' | Out-Null; $srcMain = if (Test-Path 'img.jpeg') {'img.jpeg'} elseif (Test-Path 'img2.jpeg') {'img2.jpeg'} elseif (Test-Path 'profile.jpg') {'profile.jpg'} else { throw 'No local source image found in project root.' }; $srcAlt = if (Test-Path 'img2.jpeg') {'img2.jpeg'} else {$srcMain}; $srcProfile = if (Test-Path 'profile.jpg') {'profile.jpg'} else {$srcMain}; Copy-Item $srcProfile 'assets/img/blog/author.png' -Force; 1..5 | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $srcMain ('assets/img/blog/single_blog_' + $_ + '.png') -Force }; Copy-Item $srcAlt 'assets/img/blog/blog_post_1.jpg' -Force; 1..3 | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $srcProfile ('assets/img/blog/comment_' + $_ + '.png') -Force }; 'h1_hero.png','h1_hero1.png','h2_hero2.png','hero-icon.png','hero2.png' | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $srcAlt ('assets/img/hero/' + $_) -Force }; 'video-bg.png','footer-bg.png','map.png','offers1.png','offers2.png','offers3.png' | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $srcMain ('assets/img/gallery/' + $_) -Force }; if ((Test-Path 'profile.jpg') -and -not (Test-Path 'PROFILE.jpeg')) { Copy-Item 'profile.jpg' 'PROFILE.jpeg' -Force }; Write-Output 'done'

tasks.label: populate-missing-images-cmd
args: mkdir assets\img\blog assets\img\hero assets\img\gallery 2>nul && copy /Y profile.jpg assets\img\blog\author.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\blog\single_blog_1.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\blog\single_blog_2.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\blog\single_blog_3.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\blog\single_blog_4.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\blog\single_blog_5.png >nul && copy /Y img2.jpeg assets\img\blog\blog_post_1.jpg >nul && copy /Y profile.jpg assets\img\blog\comment_1.png >nul && copy /Y profile.jpg assets\img\blog\comment_2.png >nul && copy /Y profile.jpg assets\img\blog\comment_3.png >nul && copy /Y img2.jpeg assets\img\hero\h1_hero.png >nul && copy /Y img2.jpeg assets\img\hero\h1_hero1.png >nul && copy /Y img2.jpeg assets\img\hero\h2_hero2.png >nul && copy /Y img2.jpeg assets\img\hero\hero-icon.png >nul && copy /Y img2.jpeg assets\img\hero\hero2.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\gallery\video-bg.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\gallery\footer-bg.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\gallery\map.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\gallery\offers1.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\gallery\offers2.png >nul && copy /Y img.jpeg assets\img\gallery\offers3.png >nul && copy /Y profile.jpg PROFILE.jpeg >nul && echo done
